name: Oversized Lumbar Woven Pillow Blue - Threshold™
description:
Bring a splash of texture to your couch with this Oversized Lumbar Woven Throw Pillow from Threshold™. This oblong pillow showcases a dobby-surface front in textured blue with a beige reverse for a pop of contrast. Featuring a soft blend exterior of cotton, acrylic and linen and a well-filled interior, the oversized throw pillow adds ample comfort and style to your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
